---
title: Reading
listing:
  - id: y2026
    contents: reading/2026
    date-format: "MMM"
    type: table
    table-hover: true
    sort: "date desc"
    page-size: 100
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, author, Rating, date]
    field-display-names:
      date: "✓"
  - id: y2025
    contents: reading/2025
    date-format: "MMM"
    type: table
    table-hover: true
    sort: "date desc"
    page-size: 100
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, author, Rating, date]
    field-display-names:
      date: "✓"
  - id: y2024
    contents: reading/2024
    date-format: "MMM"
    type: table
    table-hover: true
    sort: "date desc"
    page-size: 100
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, author, Rating, date]
    field-display-names:
      date: "✓"
  - id: y2023
    contents: reading/2023
    date-format: "MMM"
    type: table
    table-hover: true
    sort: "date desc"
    page-size: 100
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, author, Rating, date]
    field-display-names:
      date: "✓"
---
## 2026

:::{#y2026}
:::

## 2025

:::{#y2025}
:::

## 2024

:::{#y2024}
:::

## 2023

:::{#y2023}
:::
